title: Assertion fault on a query against a view
poc: CREATE VIEW vvv AS SELECT b FROM t2 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT 123 FROM t1, (SELECT b FROM vvv UNION ALL SELECT c from t3);
key_bug_features: Querying a view with UNION ALL causes assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE VIEW vvv AS SELECT b FROM t2 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT 123 FROM t1, (SELECT b FROM vvv UNION ALL SELECT c FROM t3 WHERE c IS NOT NULL);
